a:s.a:s: // Act Codes code "Perform lifetime risk assessment": 'lifetimeriskassessment' from
// Reason Codes code "High lifetime risk": 'highlifetimerisk' from

def.name: First degree relative with genetic marker or syndrome
def.display: First degree relative with genetic marker or syndrome

a:s.a:s: code "First degree relative with genetic marker or syndrome": 'firstdeggenetic' from
display 'First degree relative with genetic marker or syndrome'

def.name: BI-RADS breast density category C or D

display 'BI-RADS breast density category C or D'

def.name: Compelling family history of breast cancer
